title: Line Chart
summary: ✓ Clear line patterns for colorblind users. Add pattern overlays.
keywords: Primary: #0080FF. Multiple series: use distinct colors. Fill: 20% opacity
✓ Clear line patterns for colorblind users. Add pattern overlays.

title: Bar Chart (Horizontal or Vertical)
summary: ✓ Easy to compare. Add value labels on bars for clarity.
keywords: Each bar: distinct color. Category: grouped same color. Sorted: descending order
✓ Easy to compare. Add value labels on bars for clarity.

title: Pie Chart or Donut
summary: ⚠ Hard for accessibility. Better: Stacked bar with legend. Avoid pie if >5 items.
keywords: Colors: 5-6 max. Contrasting palette. Large slices first. Use labels.
⚠ Hard for accessibility. Better: Stacked bar with legend. Avoid pie if >5 items.

title: Scatter Plot or Bubble Chart
summary: ⚠ Provide data table alternative. Use pattern + color distinction.
keywords: Color axis: gradient (blue-red). Size: relative. Opacity: 0.6-0.8 to show density
⚠ Provide data table alternative. Use pattern + color distinction.

title: Heat Map or Choropleth
summary: ⚠ Colorblind: Use pattern overlay. Provide numerical legend.
keywords: Gradient: Cool (blue) to Hot (red). Scale: clear legend. Divergent for ±data
⚠ Colorblind: Use pattern overlay. Provide numerical legend.

title: Choropleth Map, Bubble Map
summary: ⚠ Include text labels for regions. Provide data table alternative.
keywords: Regional: single color gradient or categorized colors. Legend: clear scale
⚠ Include text labels for regions. Provide data table alternative.

title: Funnel Chart, Sankey
summary: ✓ Clear stage labels + percentages. Good for accessibility if labeled.
keywords: Stages: gradient (starting color → ending color). Show conversion %
✓ Clear stage labels + percentages. Good for accessibility if labeled.

title: Gauge Chart or Bullet Chart
summary: ✓ Add numerical value + percentage label beside gauge.
keywords: Performance: Red→Yellow→Green gradient. Target: marker line. Threshold colors
✓ Add numerical value + percentage label beside gauge.

title: Line with Confidence Band
summary: ✓ Clearly distinguish actual vs forecast. Add legend.
keywords: Actual: solid line #0080FF. Forecast: dashed #FF9500. Band: light shading
✓ Clearly distinguish actual vs forecast. Add legend.

title: Line Chart with Highlights
summary: ✓ Circle/marker for anomalies. Add text alert annotation.
keywords: Normal: blue #0080FF. Anomaly: red #FF0000 circle/square marker + alert
✓ Circle/marker for anomalies. Add text alert annotation.

title: Treemap
summary: ⚠ Poor - provide table alternative. Label large areas.
keywords: Parent: distinct hues. Children: lighter shades. White borders 2-3px.
⚠ Poor - provide table alternative. Label large areas.

title: Sankey Diagram
summary: ⚠ Poor - provide flow table alternative.
keywords: Gradient from source to target. Opacity 0.4-0.6 for flows.

title: Waterfall Chart
summary: ✓ Good - clear directional colors with labels.
keywords: ✓ Good - clear directional colors with labels.

title: Radar/Spider Chart
summary: ⚠ Moderate - limit 5-8 axes. Add data table.
keywords: Single: #0080FF 20% fill. Multiple: distinct colors per dataset.
⚠ Moderate - limit 5-8 axes. Add data table.

title: Candlestick Chart
summary: ⚠ Moderate - provide OHLC data table.

title: Network Graph
summary: ❌ Very Poor - provide adjacency list alternative.
keywords: Node types: categorical colors. Edges: #90A4AE 60% opacity.
❌ Very Poor - provide adjacency list alternative.

title: Box Plot
summary: ✓ Good - include stats table (min, Q1, median, Q3, max).

title: Bullet Chart
summary: ✓ Excellent - compact with clear values.

title: Waffle Chart
summary: ✓ Good - better than pie for accessibility.
keywords: 10x10 grid. 3-5 categories max. 2-3px spacing between squares.
✓ Good - better than pie for accessibility.

title: Sunburst Chart
summary: ⚠ Poor - provide hierarchy table alternative.
keywords: Center to outer: darker to lighter. 15-20% lighter per level.

title: Decomposition Tree
summary: ✓ clear hierarchy. Allow keyboard navigation for nodes.
keywords: Nodes: #2563EB (Primary) vs #EF4444 (Negative impact). Connectors: Neutral grey.
✓ clear hierarchy. Allow keyboard navigation for nodes.

title: 3D Scatter/Surface Plot
summary: ❌ Poor - requires alternative 2D view or data table.
keywords: Depth cues: lighting/shading. Z-axis: color gradient (cool to warm).
❌ Poor - requires alternative 2D view or data table.

title: Streaming Area Chart
summary: ⚠ Flashing elements - provide pause button. High contrast.
keywords: Current: Bright Pulse (#00FF00). History: Fading opacity. Grid: Dark.
⚠ Flashing elements - provide pause button. High contrast.

title: Word Cloud with Sentiment
summary: ⚠ Word clouds poor for screen readers. Use list view.
keywords: ⚠ Word clouds poor for screen readers. Use list view.

title: Process Map / Graph
summary: ⚠ Complex graphs hard to navigate. Provide path summary.
keywords: ⚠ Complex graphs hard to navigate. Provide path summary.
